title: The Church in God’s Prophetic Plan
summary: The church is God’s body on earth. God had planned from eternity to create a people who would be made in his image and have his moral character. “So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them” (Genesis 1:27). However, the image this scripture speaks about is not one of dust. God was looking ahead into the time he would put on flesh and blood made of his own word and Spirit. “Nevertheless death reigned from Adam to Moses, even over them that had not sinned after the similitude of Adam's transgression, who is the figure of him that was to come” (Romans 5:14). Our focus today is not the nature of God’s church, but its destiny, so let us explore scriptures that broach this subject. Nevertheless, let every Christian know that his or her main assignment in this world, besides bringing people to salvation, is to testify to the prophetic events that point to the return of the Lord. We are the children of Issachar whose job it was to interpret the signs of the times for the children of Israel.
